{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Riyusai Meira's Goldsign
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Riyusai Meira's Goldsign]] consists of vivid green vines and pink flowers growing out of her head.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
